# Afreen-Portfolio
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Afreen Irfan — Digital Marketing Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #0B1F3A;
    --gold: #C9A84C;
    --gold-light: #F0D080;
    --cream: #FAF7F2;
    --warm-white: #FFFDF9;
    --muted: #7A8898;
    --accent: #1A5276;
    --soft-blue: #D6EAF8;
    --card-bg: #FFFFFF;
    --border: #E8E0D4;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--navy);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(11,31,58,0.97);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 48px; height: 64px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--navy);
    display: flex; align-items: center;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    padding: 80px 48px 60px;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: -200px; right: -200px;
    width: 700px; height: 700px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(201,168,76,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: -100px; left: -100px;
    width: 400px; height: 400px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,82,118,0.3) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 700px; }
  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    color: var(--warm-white);
    line-height: 1.08;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-weight: 900;
  }
  .hero h1 em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    margin: 20px 0 36px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 520px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .hero-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 44px; }
  .badge {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .hero-cta {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--navy);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .hero-cta:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  /* SECTION COMMONS */
  section { padding: 100px 48px; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    color: var(--navy);
    line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .section-title span { color: var(--accent); }

  /* ABOUT */
  .about { background: var(--warm-white); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 64px; align-items: start; }
  .about-text p {
    font-size: 1.02rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #3A4A5C;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .about-text strong { color: var(--navy); font-weight: 600; }
  .stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; }
  .stat-card {
    background: var(--navy);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 28px 24px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .stat-number {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2.4rem;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  /* EXPERIENCE */
  .experience { background: var(--cream); }
  .timeline { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; }
  .timeline-item {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr;
    gap: 0; position: relative;
  }
  .timeline-item::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; left: 208px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 1px; background: var(--border);
  }
  .timeline-date {
    padding: 32px 32px 32px 0;
    text-align: right;
  }
  .timeline-date .period {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--gold);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .timeline-date .company {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 400;
  }
  .timeline-dot {
    position: absolute; left: 200px; top: 36px;
    width: 18px; height: 18px;
    background: var(--gold);
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid var(--cream);
    z-index: 2;
  }
  .timeline-content { padding: 28px 0 28px 48px; }
  .timeline-content h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .timeline-content ul { list-style: none; }
  .timeline-content ul li {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #4A5C6E;
    line-height: 1.6;
    padding: 4px 0 4px 18px;
    position: relative;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .timeline-content ul li::before {
    content: '→';
    position: absolute; left: 0;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  /* SKILLS */
  .skills { background: var(--navy); }
  .skills .section-title { color: var(--warm-white); }
  .skills-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 24px; }
  .skill-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 32px 28px;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;
  }
  .skill-card:hover {
    border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.4);
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.05);
  }
  .skill-icon {
    font-size: 1.8rem;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: block;
  }
  .skill-card h4 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
  .skill-tag {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    font-size: 0.73rem;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  /* PORTFOLIO / WORK */
  .work { background: var(--warm-white); }
  .work-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 28px; }
  .work-card {
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--card-bg);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  .work-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(11,31,58,0.12);
  }
  .work-image {
    height: 200px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 500;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .work-image.ig { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #833ab4, #fd1d1d, #fcb045); }
  .work-image.brand { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0B1F3A, #1A5276); }
  .work-image.strategy { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C9A84C, #8B6914); }
  .placeholder-text {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    border: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .work-info { padding: 24px; }
  .work-tag {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: block;
  }
  .work-info h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .work-info p {
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* CERTIFICATIONS */
  .certs { background: var(--cream); }
  .certs-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
  .cert-card {
    background: var(--warm-white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 24px 28px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .cert-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold); }
  .cert-logo {
    width: 48px; height: 48px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .cert-logo.google { background: #FFF3E0; }
  .cert-logo.hubspot { background: #FFF0EC; }
  .cert-info h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--navy);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .cert-info span {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  /* PROJECTS */
  .projects { background: var(--warm-white); }
  .projects-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 24px; }
  .project-card {
    background: var(--cream);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 32px 28px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .project-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--accent));
  }
  .project-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .project-card p {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: #4A5C6E;
    line-height: 1.65;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .project-tools { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 16px; }
  .project-tool {
    background: var(--navy);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
  }

  /* CONTACT */
  .contact {
    background: var(--navy);
    text-align: center;
    padding: 100px 48px;
  }
  .contact .section-title { color: var(--warm-white); margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .contact p {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    font-size: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 44px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .contact-links { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .contact-btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .contact-btn.primary { background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy); }
  .contact-btn.secondary {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  }

  /* CANVA GUIDE BANNER */
  .canva-banner {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6, #3B82F6);
    color: white;
    padding: 20px 48px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 0.88rem;
  }
  .canva-banner strong { font-weight: 600; }
  .canva-banner span { opacity: 0.85; }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 0 20px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 60px 20px; }
    .hero { padding: 100px 20px 60px; }
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .work-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .certs-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .timeline-item { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .timeline-item::before { display: none; }
    .timeline-date { padding: 16px 0 0; text-align: left; }
    .timeline-dot { display: none; }
    .timeline-content { padding: 12px 0 28px; }
    .canva-banner { flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; text-align: center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- CANVA TIP BANNER -->
<div class="canva-banner">
  <div>🎨 <strong>Canva Portfolio Guide</strong> — <span>Recreate each section as a slide. Use Navy (#0B1F3A), Gold (#C9A84C) & Cream (#FAF7F2) as your brand palette.</span></div>
  <span style="opacity:0.7; font-size:0.78rem;">Fonts: Playfair Display (headings) + DM Sans (body)</span>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Afreen Irfan</div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
    <a href="#work">Work</a>
    <a href="#certs">Certifications</a>
    <a href="#projects">Projects</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO — SLIDE 1 -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-tag">📍 Kerala, India · Open to Remote & International</div>
    <h1>Digital<br><em>Marketing</em><br>Specialist</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">
      I turn brand stories into scroll-stopping content, data into growth decisions, and creative ideas into measurable results. 1.5+ years across sales & digital marketing.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-badges">
      <span class="badge">Social Media Strategy</span>
      <span class="badge">Brand Communications</span>
      <span class="badge">Growth Marketing</span>
      <span class="badge">AI-Powered Content</span>
      <span class="badge">Performance Ads</span>
    </div>
    <a href="#work" class="hero-cta">View My Work ↓</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT — SLIDE 2 -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="section-label">01 — About Me</div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text">
      <h2 class="section-title">The story<br><span>behind the work</span></h2>
      <p>I'm a digital marketing specialist with a <strong>rare combo</strong> — institutional sales experience from Birla Opus Prime and hands-on creative marketing at Yokomet, a creative agency startup.</p>
      <p>That means I don't just make pretty content. I understand <strong>how businesses grow</strong>, what makes clients say yes, and how to build brand presence that actually converts.</p>
      <p>My PGDM research in consumer behaviour and AI adoption in marketing gives me the analytical edge that most creatives lack. I use AI tools daily — not to replace creativity, but to <strong>amplify it</strong>.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-number">1.5+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years of Experience</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-number">5+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Certifications</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-number">10+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">AI Tools Mastered</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-number">3</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Research Projects</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE — SLIDE 3 -->
<section class="experience" id="experience">
  <div class="section-label">02 — Experience</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Where I've<br><span>built my craft</span></h2>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-date">
        <span class="period">Dec 2025 – Present</span>
        <span class="company">Yokomet, Kerala</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Digital Marketing Assistant</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Built Instagram content strategy from zero — calendar, captions, creatives, reels</li>
          <li>Managed brand voice and social media presence for a creative agency</li>
          <li>Produced short-form video using CapCut & ElevenLabs for brand storytelling</li>
          <li>Used ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini to accelerate content & campaign planning</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-date">
        <span class="period">Jun 2025 – Nov 2025</span>
        <span class="company">Birla Opus Prime</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Sales Management Trainee</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Managed institutional & government client accounts across Kerala</li>
          <li>Conducted market visits and client presentations, building B2B pipeline</li>
          <li>Gained brand communication exposure in a premium pan-India brand context</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-date">
        <span class="period">Apr – May 2025</span>
        <span class="company">Birla Opus</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Institutional Sales Intern</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Visited field locations to understand client requirements — dealers, contractors, institutions, and government bodies</li>
          <li>Handled paperwork for government approvals and communicated with different authorities</li>
          <li>Almost secured entry into the Kerala Metro Phase 2 project — a significant institutional win at intern level</li>
          <li>Conducted primary research on customer preference and documented insights for the sales team</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-date">
        <span class="period">Apr – Jun 2024</span>
        <span class="company">Arvind Fashions Ltd</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Summer Intern — Retail Operations</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Worked across inventory management, customer sales, and retail operations in Bengaluru</li>
          <li>Monitored stock levels and ensured efficient product allocation across stores</li>
          <li>Engaged directly with customers to drive sales and deliver personalised service</li>
          <li>Supported day-to-day retail operations and customer loyalty initiatives</li>
          <li>Gained hands-on understanding of retail management in a large-scale fashion environment</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS — SLIDE 4 -->
<section class="skills" id="skills">
  <div class="section-label" style="color:var(--gold-light)">03 — Skills & Tools</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">What I bring<br>to the table</h2>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card">
      <span class="skill-icon">📱</span>
      <h4>Social Media & Content</h4>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Instagram Strategy</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Content Calendar</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Caption Writing</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Reels</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Brand Voice</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <span class="skill-icon">🤖</span>
      <h4>AI & Creative Tools</h4>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">ChatGPT</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Claude</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Gemini</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">ElevenLabs</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Canva</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">CapCut</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Envato</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <span class="skill-icon">📊</span>
      <h4>Marketing Platforms</h4>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Google Ads (Theory)</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Meta Business Suite</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">HubSpot Marketing</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Email Marketing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <span class="skill-icon">🔬</span>
      <h4>Research & Analytics</h4>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">SPSS</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">SmartPLS</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Consumer Behaviour</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Market Research</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Primary Research</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <span class="skill-icon">🏷️</span>
      <h4>Brand & Strategy</h4>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Brand Communications</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Growth Marketing</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Campaign Planning</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">B2B Marketing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <span class="skill-icon">🎯</span>
      <h4>Sales & Client Relations</h4>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">B2B Client Handling</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Institutional Sales</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Government Liaison</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Retail Sales</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Customer Development</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WORK SAMPLES — SLIDE 5 -->
<section class="work" id="work">
  <div class="section-label">04 — Work Samples</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Content &<br><span>campaigns I've built</span></h2>
  <div class="work-grid">
    <div class="work-card">
      <div class="work-image" style="background:#1a1a2e; padding:0; overflow:hidden;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top;" alt="Coolpex IHMS Campaign"/>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <span class="work-tag">Coolpex IHMS · Performance Ad</span>
        <h3>"You cleaned everything. Except what you breathe."</h3>
        <p>Pain-point led ad creative for an air quality brand — concept, copy, and visual direction crafted to drive home assessment bookings.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="work-card">
      <div class="work-image" style="background:#f5f0e8; padding:0; overflow:hidden;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top;" alt="Spiceland Kerala Campaign"/>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <span class="work-tag">Spiceland Holidays · Brand Ad</span>
        <h3>"Plan your dream getaway to Kerala"</h3>
        <p>Cinematic double-exposure travel ad for a Kerala tourism brand — combining editorial photography direction with aspirational copywriting.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="work-card">
      <div class="work-image" style="background:#2d1b0e; padding:0; overflow:hidden;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top;" alt="Anti Ageing Lab Campaign"/>
      </div>
      <div class="work-info">
        <span class="work-tag">Anti Ageing Lab · Editorial Ad</span>
        <h3>"Look Closer. Ageing starts silently."</h3>
        <p>Luxury editorial ad for a skincare clinic — minimalist concept, high-end typography, and emotional copywriting designed to convert.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- AI VIDEO FEATURE CARD -->
  <div style="margin-top: 48px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0B1F3A 60%, #1A3A5C); border-radius: 20px; padding: 48px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 48px; align-items: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden;">
    <div style="position:absolute; top:-60px; right:-60px; width:300px; height:300px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(201,168,76,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); border-radius:50%;"></div>
    <div style="position: relative; z-index: 2;">
      <div style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:rgba(201,168,76,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); color:#C9A84C; font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:6px 14px; border-radius:100px; margin-bottom:20px; font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;">
        ⚡ Premium Skill · AI Video Production
      </div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:2rem; color:#FAF7F2; line-height:1.2; margin-bottom:16px; font-weight:700;">AI-Generated<br><em style="color:#C9A84C;">Brand Reels</em></h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.92rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); line-height:1.75; margin-bottom:28px; font-weight:300;">Produced 3 complete AI-powered brand reels for clients — from script concept to final video. Combined AI voiceover, video editing, and visual effects to create professional short-form content without a full production team.</p>
      <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px;">
        <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size:0.75rem; padding:6px 14px; border-radius:6px;">🎙️ ElevenLabs — AI Voiceover</span>
        <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size:0.75rem; padding:6px 14px; border-radius:6px;">🎬 CapCut — Video Editing</span>
        <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size:0.75rem; padding:6px 14px; border-radius:6px;">✨ Highfield — AI Visuals</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="position: relative; z-index: 2; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px;">
      <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius:12px; padding:20px 24px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;">
        <span style="font-size:2rem;">🎬</span>
        <div>
          <div style="color:#FAF7F2; font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px;">3 AI Brand Reels Delivered</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-size:0.78rem;">End-to-end client production</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius:12px; padding:20px 24px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;">
        <span style="font-size:2rem;">🎙️</span>
        <div>
          <div style="color:#FAF7F2; font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px;">AI Voiceover + Visual Sync</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-size:0.78rem;">ElevenLabs human-quality voice</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:rgba(201,168,76,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-radius:12px; padding:20px 24px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;">
          <span style="font-size:1.4rem;">▶️</span>
          <div>
            <div style="color:#C9A84C; font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:4px;">3 AI Brand Reels — Watch Now</div>
            <div style="color:rgba(201,168,76,0.6); font-size:0.78rem;">Ramadan · Object Talking · Coolpex</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Lze1-HjlaLcnOM8E0vVWsw_cm32WpH75?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; background:#C9A84C; color:#0B1F3A; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; padding:10px 20px; border-radius:8px; text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; letter-spacing:0.03em;">▶ Watch Videos</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RESEARCH PROJECTS — SLIDE 7 -->
<section class="projects" id="projects">
  <div class="section-label">06 — Research & Projects</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">The analytical<br><span>side of me</span></h2>
  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card">
      <h3>E-Commerce & Impulsive Buying Behaviour</h3>
      <p>PGDM dissertation studying how online shopping experience drives impulsive purchases across top Indian e-commerce platforms. Used SmartPLS & SPSS analysis with urban and semi-urban Kerala consumers.</p>
      <div class="project-tools">
        <span class="project-tool">SmartPLS</span>
        <span class="project-tool">SPSS</span>
        <span class="project-tool">Consumer Research</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <h3>Digital Marketing in IMC — Group Project</h3>
      <p>Developed an Integrated Marketing Communications plan across digital and traditional channels for a brand campaign. Covered media mix, messaging strategy, and audience targeting.</p>
      <div class="project-tools">
        <span class="project-tool">IMC Strategy</span>
        <span class="project-tool">Campaign Planning</span>
        <span class="project-tool">Digital Marketing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <h3>USPA Customer Preference Study</h3>
      <p>Internship project at Arvind Fashion Pvt Ltd analysing customer preference and trial room etiquette for the USPA brand, with actionable recommendations for brand improvement.</p>
      <div class="project-tools">
        <span class="project-tool">Primary Research</span>
        <span class="project-tool">Brand Analysis</span>
        <span class="project-tool">Retail Marketing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
